current_plan_sql: SELECT DISTINCT A."SEGMENTID" AS segment_id, A."NAME" AS segment_name, D."TARGETID" AS target_id, D."NAME" AS target_name FROM "dim_segment" AS A JOIN "hkg_br_segment_target" AS AD ON A."SEGMENTID" = AD."SEGMENTID" JOIN "dim_target" AS D ON AD."TARGETID" = D."TARGETID" WHERE D."CREATEDTIME" >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 3
query: List all audiences in the sandbox that have been mapped to new destinations in the last 3 months.
